profile.name: Brawler Trooper
profile.behaviorRules: This NPO will move towards the enemy to fight them, but will seek cover on its way. When activated, if it can perform either of its first two actions during that activation, give it an Engage order. If it cannot, give it a Conceal order. 1. Fight . 2. Charge the closest player operative via the shortest possible route. 3. Reposition towards the closest player operative, to cover if possible (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil this, if able). 4. Dash towards the closest player operative, to cover if possible.

profile.name: Marksman Trooper
profile.behaviorRules: This NPO will move to an ideal position to shoot the enemy. When activated, if it can perform the Shoot action during that activation, give it an Engage order. If it cannot, give it a Conceal order. 1. Fall Back to cover. If possible, to a location where there is a valid target that is not obscured. 2. Shoot . Prioritise targets out of cover or with an objective. 3. Reposition to cover. If possible, to a location where there is a valid target that is not obscured (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil this, if able). 4. Dash to cover. If possible, to a location where there is a valid target that is not obscured.

profile.name: Barbgaunt
profile.behaviorRules: This NPO will move to an ideal position to shoot the enemy. When activated, if it can perform the Shoot action during that activation, give it an Engage order. If it cannot, give it a Conceal order. 1. Fall Back to cover. If possible, to a location where there's a valid target that isn't obscured, if not, to a location where there's an objective marker visible to this NPO. 2. Shoot . 3. Reposition to cover. If possible, to a location where there's a valid target that isn't obscured, if not, to a location that's appropriate to better win the mission (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil these, if able). 4. Dash to cover. If possible, to a location where there's a valid target that isn't obscured, if not, to a location that's appropriate to better win the mission.

profile.name: Canoptek Macrocyte
profile.behaviorRules: See NECRON WARRIOR . Finally, if it has a tesla caster, it will always use the living lightning profile if it would target more than one player operative and no NPOs. 1. Fight . 2. Shoot . 3. Reposition . If possible, to a location where there's a valid target that isn't obscured, if not, to a location that's appropriate for the NPOs to better win the mission (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil these, if able). 4. Dash . If possible, to a location where there's a valid target that isn't obscured. If not, to a location that's appropriate for the NPOs to better win the mission.

profile.name: Canoptek Scarab Swarm
profile.behaviorRules: This NPO will move towards the enemy to fight them, but will seek cover on its way. When activated, if it can perform either of its first two actions during that activation, give it an Engage order. If it cannot, give it a Conceal order. It will perform the Operate Hatch action where necessary to fulfil its behaviour. 1. Fight . 2. Charge the closest player operative via the shortest possible route. 3. Reposition towards the closest player operative, to cover if possible (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil this, if able). 4. Dash towards the closest player operative, to cover if possible. Kill Team Reference Sheet by James And The Giant Squig - v1.0 (updated 19 November 2025) TYPHON MISSION PACK THREAT PRINCIPLE

profile.name: Necron Warrior
profile.behaviorRules: This NPO will move to an ideal position to shoot the enemy, but will fight if it can't do anything else. When activated, if it will perform the Shoot or Fight action during that activation, give it an Engage order. If it cannot, give it a Conceal order. It will perform the Operate Hatch action where necessary to fulfil its behaviour. 1. Fall Back . If possible, to a location where there's a valid target that isn't obscured, if not, to a location that's appropriate for the NPOs to better win the mission. 2. Shoot . 3. Reposition . If possible, to a location where there's a valid target that isn't obscured. If not, to a location that's appropriate for the NPOs to better win the mission (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil these, if able). 4. Dash . If possible, to a location where there's a valid target that isn't obscured. If not, to a location that's appropriate for the NPOs to better win the mission. 5. Fight .

profile.name: Devout Brawler
profile.behaviorRules: This NPO will move towards the enemy to fight them, but will protect the Scroll Bearer NPO and seek cover on its way. When activated, if it can perform either of its first two actions during that activation, give it an Engage order. If it cannot, give it a Conceal order. Normal behaviour priority: 1. Fight. 2. Charge the closest player operative via the shortest possible route. 3. Reposition towards the closest player operative, to cover if possible (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil this, if able). 4. Dash towards the closest player operative, to cover if possible. Special behaviour (if there is no Scroll Bearer carrying the marker): 1. Pick up Marker on the Scroll marker if this operative can. 2. Fight an operative that contests the Scroll marker, or a player operative that prevents this. 3. Charge such an operative. 4. Fall Back towards the Scroll marker, to cover if possible. 5. Reposition towards the Scroll marker, to cover if possible (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil this, if able). 6. Dash towards the Scroll marker, to cover if possible.

profile.name: Devout Marksman
profile.behaviorRules: This NPO will move to an ideal position to shoot the enemy, but will protect the Scroll Bearer NPO and seek cover on its way. When activated, if it can perform either of its first two actions during that activation, give it an Engage order. If it cannot, give it a Conceal order. Normal behaviour priority: 1. Fall Back to cover, if possible to a location where there is a valid target that is not obscured and that protects the Scroll Bearer NPO or Scroll marker. 2. Shoot. 3. Reposition to cover as in the first action (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil this, if able). 4. Dash to cover as in the first action. Special behaviour (if there is no Scroll Bearer carrying the marker): 1. Pick up Marker on the Scroll marker if this operative can. 2. Fall Back towards the Scroll marker, to cover if possible. 3. Shoot a player operative that contests the Scroll marker, or a player operative that prevents this. 4. Reposition towards the Scroll marker, to cover if possible (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil this, if able). 5. Dash towards the Scroll marker, to cover if possible.

profile.name: Devout Scroll Bearer
profile.behaviorRules: This operative cannot have an Engage order, be readied, or be activated. Whenever a Scroll Bearer NPO activation card is drawn, perform a free Reposition action towards the killzone edge specified by the mission. This NPO will attempt to get as close as possible to that killzone edge, but will seek cover and protection on its way. Holy Purpose: whenever an operative is shooting, fighting against, or retaliating against this operative, in the Resolve Attack Dice step, the first time an attack dice inflicts damage on this operative during that sequence, roll one D6: on a 3+, ignore that inflicted damage. Devout Protection: whenever this operative is selected as the valid target of a Shoot action or to fight against during the Fight action, select one other NPO visible to and within 3" of it to become the valid target or to be fought against instead (as appropriate) even if it would not normally be a valid target.

profile.name: Cultist Heavy
profile.behaviorRules: This NPO will move towards the enemy to fight them, but will seek cover on its way. When activated, if it can perform either of its first two actions during that activation, give it an Engage order. If it cannot, give it a Conceal order. Exemplar of the Creed: this operative can perform two Fight actions during its activation. Priority: 1. Fight. 2. Charge the closest player operative via the shortest possible route. 3. Reposition towards the closest player operative, to cover if possible (a subsequent Dash action can fulfil this, if able). 4. Dash towards the closest player operative, to cover if possible.

profile.name: Sniper
profile.behaviorRules: This operative cannot move, have an Engage order, be readied or be activated. Whenever an NPO would activate, if this operative is a valid target for it, perform the Shoot action with this operative instead; it then has no longer reloaded. Reload: in the Ready step of each Strategy phase, this operative has reloaded. Each time after this operative performs the Shoot action, roll one D6; after that many player activations this turning point, this operative has reloaded. Sniper's Vantage: whenever this operative is shooting, operatives cannot be obscured when determining visibility from this operative, and the visibility line can be drawn from any part of the Vantage terrain this operative is on, or from the rampart touching that Vantage terrain.

profile.name: Warrior
profile.behaviorRules: Whenever this operative is shooting against, fighting against or retaliating against a wounded enemy operative, or an enemy operative that performed the Fall Back action during this turning point, this operative's weapons have the Lethal 5+ weapon rule.
